Official Payment · Secure & Trusted
Total Amount
₹0
1️⃣ UPI ID Copy Karo
2️⃣ App Kholo & Pay Karo
3️⃣ UTR Paste Karo
💳 Is UPI ID par Payment Karein
—
💜 PhonePe Se Payment Kaise Karein:
1. PhonePe app kholo
2. Home screen par "To Mobile Number" ya "To Bank/UPI ID" wala option tap karo
3. Neeche "Enter UPI ID" tab select karo
4. UPI ID paste karo: —
5. "Verify" tap karo — naam dikhega
6. Amount ₹0 enter karo → "Proceed" → Pay karo
7. Success screen par "Transaction ID" dikhega — use copy karo
📍 UTR/Txn ID kahan milegi: PhonePe → History (bottom) → Payment tap karo → "UPI Transaction ID" ya "UTR No."
🔵 Google Pay Se Payment Kaise Karein:
1. Google Pay app kholo
2. Home screen par "New Payment" button tap karo
3. "UPI ID" option select karo
4. UPI ID type karo: —
5. "Verify" tap karo — naam confirm hoga
6. Amount ₹0 enter karo → "Pay" karo
7. Success hone par "UPI transaction ID" screen par dikhegi
📍 UPI Ref ID kahan milegi: GPay → tap payment → scroll down → "UPI transaction ID" copy karo
🔵 Paytm Se Payment Kaise Karein:
1. Paytm app kholo
2. Home screen par "Pay" icon tap karo
3. "UPI ID / VPA" option select karo
4. UPI ID enter karo: —
5. "Confirm" tap karo — naam dikhe toh sahi hai
6. Amount ₹0 dalkar "Pay" karo
7. Success screen par "Order ID" ya "UTR" dikhega
📍 UTR kahan milega: Paytm → Passbook → Payment tap karo → "Bank RRN / UTR" number copy karo
🔍

🏆 Rank Criteria Settings

ℹ️ Set karein ki kitne active L1/L2/L3 members hone chahiye har rank ke liye. Self purchase always required hai Bronze ke liye.

Self purchase required (fixed)

🔒 Commission Unlock Conditions

ℹ️ Set karein ki distributor ko L1/L2/L3 commission tabhi milegi jab uske paas itne active downline members hon. 0 = koi condition nahi (hamesha milegi).
L1 Commission Milne Ke Liye
Kitne minimum active L1 members chahiye?
0 = koi lock nahi
L2 Commission Milne Ke Liye
Kitne minimum active L2 members chahiye?
0 = koi lock nahi
L3 Commission Milne Ke Liye
Kitne minimum active L3 members chahiye?
0 = koi lock nahi

🗑 Full Data Reset

⚠️ Yeh button sirf saare orders aur commission data delete karega. Distributors, products aur settings bilkul safe rahenge.

🔒 Admin Password Change

🛒 Minimum Order Settings

ℹ️ Retail aur Distributor dono ke liye minimum order value set karein.
Customer cart mein minimum itni value honi chahiye
Distributor cart mein minimum itni value honi chahiye
Ek product ka kam se kam 1 carton order karna zaroori hai
✅ Settings saved!

📁 Month-wise Data Management

ℹ️ Kisi bhi mahine ke orders aur distributor sales/commission data ko selectively delete karein. Jo months delete nahi karne hain unhe chhod dein.
⚠️ Delete Preview:
✅ Data delete ho gaya!

📥 Data Download

ℹ️ Orders ka data Excel/CSV format mein download karein — month filter ke saath ya saara data ek saath.
